name: Middle Low German

ancestors.notes: Descent per Glottolog classification of Middle Low German (midd1318).

notes: Skeleton. West Germanic (Ingvaeonic/Low Saxon) medieval stage written in the Latin alphabet. Grapheme map covers the basic vowels, doubled long vowels, the digraphs sch [ʃ], ch [x], ng and ck, and the plain consonants with v and w both mapped to [v]. Middle Low German spelling was not standardised across the Hanseatic writing tradition; vowel length and quality were marked inconsistently and are largely left unencoded, so a notable PER floor is expected.

sources.author: Hammarström, H. et al. (Glottolog 5.0)
sources.title: Glottolog: Middle Low German (midd1318)
sources.publisher: Max Planck Institute for Evolutionary Anthropology
